name: Kurt Hansen
description:
Kurt Hansen, the Colonel of BARGHEST that I (personally) love to kill!

Grudges aside, I cannot believe I left a W.I.P. bot on public for months on end. Thank you though, you, though, to Makonnen, for giving me a shoutout in your bot's description! I'm glad that my unfinished bot gave you inspiration :,]
creator: The Star System
